info.DAtuviSezaH: ayaM DAtuH prApaRArTe (nayanam asmin arTe) dvikarmakaH asti yaTA 'rAmaH grAmaM BAraM vahati' iti  parantu vahanArTe (svayaM pravahati asmin arTe) akarmakaH yasti yaTA - 'nadI vegena vahati' iti
info.english_meaning: to flow to propel to carry to  haul to drag
info.hindI_arTa: bahanA JaranA QonA Qo le jAnA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'idamApaH pravahata yatkiM ca duritaM mayi' (f॰10.9.8) apasrAvayatetyarTaH apanayata SoDayateti tAtparyArTaH

'yadanovAhyaM syAtpUrvaM taM pravaheyuH' (Apa॰6.8.28.4) pravaheyuH=nayeyuH hArayeyuH
'kaTaM raTaM tvayA hInaM pravakzyanti raTottamAH' (rA॰2.52.43)
'raTaM deva pravaha' (ASva॰gf॰2.8.5) pravaha agrataH karza

karRIraTaH pravahaRaM qayanaM ca samaM trayam ityamaraH pravahatyaneneti pravahaRam
